commands.review_summary:
The PR adds parser-backed command risk lines and highlight metadata to host exec approvals, gateway payloads, forwarded messages, view models, and the Control UI, plus related tests, a changelog entry, and an npm registry pin.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection against current main and PR head shows the commandAnalysis regression and raw-offset highlight path without needing to execute tests in this read-only review.
